arts.ttl: What is AC Milan’s biggest win of all time?
arts.sum: To date, AC Milan’s biggest ever win in Serie A was the 9-0 home victory over Palermo. AC Milan’s biggest ever away win in the club’s history came in 1955, when the club beat Genoa 8-0 in Serie A on 5 June, 1955.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Slovan Bratislava v AC Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: AC Milan are set to face Slovan Bratislava in a crucial UEFA Champions League match on Tuesday at the Štadión Tehelné pole. This match marks a significant point in the group stage as Milan aims to secure their position for the next phase of the competition. Under the guidance of coach Paulo Fonseca, the Rossonoeri will be making strategic changes to their lineup. Noah Okafor will replace Rafael Leao on the left wing, while Christian Pulisic and Samuel Chukwueze will support Tammy Abraham, who steps in for the suspended Alvaro Morata as the central striker. arts.ttl: Okafor to start against Slovan as Leao Rested
arts.sum: AC Milan face a crucial match against Slovan Bratislava, a game they must win to secure their qualification in the Champions League. Slovan currently sit at the bottom of their group, having lost all four of their matches, scoring only two goals while conceding fifteen. On paper, this should be a straightforward victory for Milan, but they have struggled in similar situations before, which adds pressure to the encounter. Calciomercato report how to adapt to these challenges, head coach Paulo Fonseca has made some tactical adjustments without drastically changing the starting lineup. arts.ttl: Abraham on Milan, Mourinho and Chelsea memories
arts.sum: BBC Sport's Nedum Onuoha travels to Italy to sample a classic Milanese dinner with AC Milan striker Tammy Abraham while catching up on what life has been like for the forward playing in Italy since his move from Chelsea.
